summary: Comprehensive testing of RCMG Live streaming platform completed. Backend API endpoints working correctly with 13/14 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with successful user registration, admin access, subscription plans, gift shop, and wallet features.

minor_issues.issue: Test login with hardcoded credentials failed - user doesn't exist
minor_issues.impact: Low - test issue only, actual login functionality works

passed_tests: Landing page loads with RCMG Live logo and branding
User registration creates account with 100 free diamonds
Admin registration for walker.elamen@gmail.com gives 1 billion diamonds and admin access
Dashboard shows diamond balance and navigation elements
Gift Shop displays gifts (4 gift images found)
Go Live page allows entering stream title and description
Subscription page shows Monthly ($9.99) and Yearly ($74.99) plans
Admin panel accessible only for admin users
Admin Overview shows stats (4 Users, 0 Streams, 1 Transaction)
Admin Diamonds tab available for granting diamonds
Wallet page shows balance (1 billion for admin) and cash out option
User authentication and authorization working correctly
Diamond balance correctly displayed in navigation and wallet
